text.title: Agency Annual Plan Template Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Annual plan spans 6 tabs; nobody reads it past Q1.
antipattern.root-cause: Plan treated as model, not artefact.
antipattern.fix: One-page hard cap; model lives separately if at all.

antipattern.symptom: Owner pours 4 months of margin into a productised bet that never ships.
antipattern.root-cause: No budget cap per investment line.
antipattern.fix: Cap each line; review against expected return at quarterly checkpoint.

antipattern.symptom: Milestone 'Launch retainer offering' owned by 'team'; nobody owns; missed.
Year ends with plan vs actual gap of 40% nobody discussed.
antipattern.fix: Quarterly checkpoint pre-scheduled in calendar; sponsor attends.
